name: Spectrum Gusto Soup For Cat With Tuna Mackerel And Broccoli 50g
description: Spectrum Gusto Cat Soup is a wholesome, complementary treat for cats and kittens. Made with real tuna fillet, mackerel, and broccoli in a savory fish broth, it provides essential protein, omega-3 fatty acids, vitamins, and fiber. Its 90% moisture content supports hydration, making it ideal for cats that drink little water. Easy to serve and highly palatable, this 50g pouch is perfect as a snack, reward, or meal enhancer while maintaining a healthy, balanced diet. Key Features: Lean protein from tuna (15.4%) and mackerel (10%). Omega-3 fatty acids for a healthy skin and coat. Broccoli for minerals, fiber, and digestive support. High-moisture content keeps cats hydrated. Convenient single-serve pouch for easy feeding.
